headline: How The Choice Hotels (CHH) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Guidance And Valuation Targets
summary: The implied fair value estimate for Choice Hotels International has shifted slightly, moving from US$112.33 to US$114.13 per share. This tweak comes as analysts update Q4 models and debate how much investors should be willing to pay given recent guidance and differing views on long term growth expectations. Read on to see how these evolving price targets fit into the broader bull and bear narrative and what that could mean for your own research. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the...

headline: How The Senior Housing Story Is Reframing National Health Investors (NHI) Valuation Targets
summary: The fair value price target for National Health Investors was adjusted slightly to $89.00 from $89.38, alongside a separate move in one research report to $92 from $85. Analysts linking these changes to senior housing point to improving fundamentals on one side and uneven execution in the operating portfolio on the other. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and mixed views can help you track the evolving narrative around the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
